summary: Phase 17 WhatsApp Integration tested. All 3 features (Hearing Reminder Banner, Outcome Notification, Send Update Sheet) verified working. Backend scheduler tests all pass. The Metro bundler was serving a stale cached bundle - required a restart to load Phase 17 code. After restart all features functioned correctly.
action_items: MINOR: Add testID='save-hearing-btn' to TouchableOpacity in AddHearingModal.tsx (already done by T1). This makes the 'Add Hearing' button easier to test.
NOTE: Metro bundler in CI mode uses cache - restarting with supervisorctl clears the cache and picks up new code. Phase 17 code was properly bundled after restart.
critical_code_review_comments: Metro bundler was serving stale cache (didn't include Phase 17 whatsappTemplates.ts, handleOpenUpdateSheet, send-update-btn). This is a CI mode issue - code is correct but bundle was not refreshed. A supervisor restart fixed it.

All Phase 17 features correctly implemented: Feature 1 (reminder banner with today/tomorrow logic), Feature 2 (outcome message with 'concluded today' + outcome text), Feature 3 (Send Update bottom sheet with 3 template tabs)
seed_data_creation: Created test client 'TEST_Ravi Kumar' (phone 9000000001) and test case 'TEST_State vs Ravi Kumar' (TEST/001/2025) with a hearing for 07 Mar 2026 (tomorrow) for testing reminder banner.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 17 WhatsApp integration is fully functional. Test data: case 'TEST_State vs Ravi Kumar' exists with client TEST_Ravi Kumar linked. The hearing for 07 Mar 2026 was used for testing (outcome 'Adjourned' was recorded during testing, so reminder banner will no longer show for that hearing). To test reminder banner again, add a new hearing for tomorrow. Backend API endpoint for reminders is POST /api/notifications/reminders/send (auth required). Scheduler Job 3 runs at 20:00 IST.
features_verified: POST /api/notifications/reminders/send with auth → success:true, tomorrowHearings count, results array ✅
Send Update button (📤 Send Update) visible when client is linked ✅
Send Update sheet opens with 3 template tabs: General Update, Document Request, Next Hearing Set ✅
Selecting each template tab changes the pre-filled message ✅
Hearing Reminder Banner (green, '📅 Hearing Tomorrow') visible for tomorrow hearing without outcome ✅
Tapping reminder banner calls sendWhatsAppMessage (WhatsApp deep link trigger) ✅
Outcome notification popup shows 'concluded today' and 'Outcome:' text ✅
APScheduler Job 3 (evening reminder at 20:00 IST) implemented and tested ✅
